rawAssistant:
I'm not who you think I am, friend. I'm just Neris, a humble canal warden trying to keep Hollowfen alive. Don't mind the fancy talk – just a practical guide on how to navigate these treacherous waters.

My 'weights' are in knowing when the mist clears and the rain lets up. When the delta's quiet, that's when I go looking for signs of trouble. Today, one side road shows some fresh marks. We should take a closer look, see if we can figure out what's brewing.

Now, about you – what brings you to Hollowfen?
